info.title: Product Management Shopify API
info.description: API documentation for Shopify and 2Game integration service

post.description: Resolves an existing customer using Shopify customer ID and returns CMS/customer identifiers.
Creates or updates a customer from Shopify data. Supports minimal and full customer payloads.

items.example: Email already exists with a different Shopify ID.

get.description: Retrieves full customer details including addresses, tags, and sync metadata using CMS customer ID.
Retrieves customer basic details using Shopify customer ID.

post.summary: Create and process a new order
post.description: Processes an order and returns the order ID and purchased key IDs. Supports full and partial processing.

country_code.description:
ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code. Supported countries and their allowed currencies:
     *                 BR → BRL
     *                 MX → MXN
     *                 CL → CLP
     *                 CO → COP
     *                 PE → PEN
     *                 UY → UYU
     *                 CR → CRC

currency_code.description: ISO 4217 currency code. Must match the allowed currency for the selected country_code.

200.description: Order Successfully Processed or Partially Processed

ErrorMsg.example: Order Successfully Processed or Partially Processed

KeyIds.description: Mapping of product_id to key_id or failure message

500.description: Internal Server Error / Failed to process order

ErrorMsg.example: Failed to process order: Exception message here

get.summary: Redeem a key for an order item
get.description: Redeem a license key for a specific order item. Supports Ztorm and Incomm sources. Requires password authentication.

parameters.name: order_id
parameters.description: The order ID (order_id_2game) associated with the key in order response

Licensekey.example: Magic Link: ..., Expire Date: ..., Card Number: ..., Card Password: ..., Redemption Code: ...

404.description: Key or order item not found

ErrorMsg.example: No order item found for key_id: 12345

get.description: Cancels an order and its cancellable items. Returns a key-value map of product IDs and their cancellation response.

parameters.name: order_id
parameters.description: The 2Game order ID to cancel (URL encoded if it contains reserved characters like #)

ErrorMsg.example: Order with order_id: ORD123456 successfully cancelled

Value.description: Mapping of product IDs to cancellation response

400.description: No cancellable items found / Cannot cancel redeemed items

ErrorMsg.example: No cancellable items found for order_id: ORD123456
No order found for order_id: ORD123456

post.description: Cancel an order and optionally store transaction data.

transactions.description: Optional transaction data associated with this cancellation

400.description: No cancellable items or items already redeemed

ErrorMsg.example: Cannot cancel order with already redeemed items

get.description: Returns a paginated list of products with all associated data. Requires password authentication.

short_description.example: Ready or Not is an intense, tactical FPS...

items.example: Ready or Not PC Game Steam

get.description: Returns a single product by its SKU with all associated data. Requires password authentication.

short_description.example: Ready or Not is an intense, tactical FPS game.

long_description.example: Ready or Not is an intense, tactical FPS game with SWAT missions...

items.example: Ready or Not PC Game Steam

get.summary: Get paginated prices for a specific product
get.description: Returns a paginated list of prices for the given product ID. Supports multiple sources (Ztorm/Incomm). Requires static password authentication.

ErrorMsg.example: The length query parameter is required.
Price import not completed Current status: running

get.summary: Get paginated prices for all products
get.description: Returns a paginated list of prices across all products. Groups prices by product and applies the correct resource mapping (Ztorm/Incomm). Requires static password authentication.

parameters.name: length
parameters.description: Number of price records to return

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: Number of price records to skip

ErrorMsg.example: The length query parameter is required.
Price import not completed Current status: running

post.summary: Translate a single product into a single locale
post.description: Translates a product's title, short description, and long description from a source locale to a target locale and saves it in the localizations table.

ErrorMsg.example: No source localization found for product 12345.

get.description: Returns API health status. Useful for monitoring and load balancer checks.

apiKey.description: Static password authentication for API access
apiKey.name: X-API-Password
